The '''Z-95XT Trainer''' was a training model of the [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]]. It possessed a second seat for a passenger such as a flight trainer, but lacked the standard Z-95's [[Concussion missile launcher/Legends|concussion missile system]]. They were often used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] for ferrying personnel in-system or between ships within the same fleet, in addition to their stated use of personnel training.<ref name="RAS2" />

The [[Laser/Legends|lasers]] could be set to only illuminate a target, and therefore not damage it. While still under suspicion of being an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Sleeper agent/Legends|sleeper agent]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] was assigned a Z-95XT that had been rigged with a [[remote detonator]] for his training missions with the reconstituted [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]].<ref name="RS" />
